items.title: Amazon CloudWatch now supports ingesting Security Hub CSPM findings with organization-wide enablement

items.title: AWS launches Sustainability console for carbon emissions tracking

items.title: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink now supports Apache Flink 2.2
items.snippet: Amazon Managed Service for Apache Flink now supports Apache Flink version 2.2. This is a major upgrade that brings runtime improvements such as Java 17 support, RocksDB 8.10.0 for better I/O performance, and serialization enhancements. Additionally, Dataset…

items.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio adds Observability for AWS Glue jobs via CloudWatch metrics
items.snippet: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio adds Observability for jobs, it now displays Amazon CloudWatch metrics for AWS Glue jobs directly alongside job logs in a single, unified interface. This enhancement adds observability to SageMaker Unified Studio, enabling data…

items.title: Announcing the AWS Sustainability console: Programmatic access, configurable CSV reports, and Scope 1–3 reporting in one place
items.snippet: AWS announces the Sustainability console, a new standalone service that consolidates carbon emissions reporting and resources, giving sustainability teams independent access to Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions data without requiring billing permissions.
